'''tobathaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:shadowlike|shadowlike]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-b-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:shadowlike|shadowlike]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| tobathaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:tobathithi|tobathithi]] || [[word:tobathiji|tobathiji]] || [[word:tobathishi|tobathishi]] || [[word:tobathiki|tobathiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:tobathuthuthu|tobathuthuthu]] || [[word:tobathujuju|tobathujuju]] || [[word:tobathushushu|tobathushushu]] || [[word:tobathukuku|tobathukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:tobathuthu|tobathuthu]] || [[word:tobathuju|tobathuju]] || [[word:tobathushu|tobathushu]] || [[word:tobathuku|tobathuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:tobathufthuf|tobathufthuf]] || [[word:tobathufjuf|tobathufjuf]] || [[word:tobathufshuf|tobathufshuf]] || [[word:tobathufkuf|tobathufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:tobathethe|tobathethe]] || [[word:tobatheje|tobatheje]] || [[word:tobatheshe|tobatheshe]] || [[word:tobatheke|tobatheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:tobathothotho|tobathothotho]] || [[word:tobathojojo|tobathojojo]] || [[word:tobathoshosho|tobathoshosho]] || [[word:tobathokoko|tobathokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tobathotho|tobathotho]] || [[word:tobathojo|tobathojo]] || [[word:tobathosho|tobathosho]] || [[word:tobathoko|tobathoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tobathofthof|tobathofthof]] || [[word:tobathofjof|tobathofjof]] || [[word:tobathofshof|tobathofshof]] || [[word:tobathofkof|tobathofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:tobathïfthïf|tobathïfthïf]] || [[word:tobathïfjïf|tobathïfjïf]] || [[word:tobathïfshïf|tobathïfshïf]] || [[word:tobathïfkïf|tobathïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:tobathïfthïfthïf|tobathïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:tobathïfjïfjïf|tobathïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:tobathïfshïfshïf|tobathïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:tobathïfkïfkïf|tobathïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:tobathïfthïf|tobathïfthïf]] || [[word:tobathïfjïf|tobathïfjïf]] || [[word:tobathïfshïf|tobathïfshïf]] || [[word:tobathïfkïf|tobathïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:tobathïfthïf|tobathïfthïf]] || [[word:tobathïfjïf|tobathïfjïf]] || [[word:tobathïfshïf|tobathïfshïf]] || [[word:tobathïfkïf|tobathïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:tobathæthæ|tobathæthæ]] || [[word:tobathæjæ|tobathæjæ]] || [[word:tobathæshæ|tobathæshæ]] || [[word:tobathækæ|tobathækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:tobathathatha|tobathathatha]] || [[word:tobathajaja|tobathajaja]] || [[word:tobathashasha|tobathashasha]] || [[word:tobathakaka|tobathakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tobathatha|tobathatha]] || [[word:tobathaja|tobathaja]] || [[word:tobathasha|tobathasha]] || [[word:tobathaka|tobathaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tobathafthaf|tobathafthaf]] || [[word:tobathafjaf|tobathafjaf]] || [[word:tobathafshaf|tobathafshaf]] || [[word:tobathafkaf|tobathafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:tobathasha|tobathasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:tobathshësha|tobathshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tobathrosha|tobathrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tobathmusha|tobathmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:tobathyasha|tobathyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotobathnkshësha|gotobathnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotobathnkrosha|gotobathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotobathnkmusha|gotobathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotobathnkyasha|gotobathnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:tobabathasha|tobabathasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:tobabathshësha|tobabathshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tobabathrosha|tobabathrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tobabathmusha|tobabathmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:tobabathyasha|tobabathyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotobabathnkshësha|gotobabathnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotobabathnkrosha|gotobabathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotobabathnkmusha|gotobabathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotobabathnkyasha|gotobabathnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:tebæthasha|tebæthasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:tebæthshësha|tebæthshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tebæthrosha|tebæthrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tebæthmusha|tebæthmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:tebæthyasha|tebæthyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotebæthnkshësha|gotebæthnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotebæthnkrosha|gotebæthnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotebæthnkmusha|gotebæthnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotebæthnkyasha|gotebæthnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:tobfathasha|tobfathasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:tobfathshësha|tobfathshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tobfathrosha|tobfathrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tobfathmusha|tobfathmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:tobfathyasha|tobfathyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotobfathnkshësha|gotobfathnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotobfathnkrosha|gotobfathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotobfathnkmusha|gotobfathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotobfathnkyasha|gotobfathnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
